name: io.github.mizukaizen/x402-tools-mcp
description: 22 pay-per-call x402 utility APIs for AI agents. No accounts, no API keys. USDC on Base.

environmentVariables.name: X402_PAYMENT_HEADER
environmentVariables.description: Signed x402 payment token from your wallet client. Set if handling payments manually.

environmentVariables.name: X402_INTERNAL_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bypass key for trusted internal callers — skips x402 payment flow entirely.
